[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101010101 5
1 011111110 7
2 111101001 6
3 000000000 a
4 001001101 4
5 001011101 5
6 000000010 1
7 000000010 1

01 10 001001101 4 match 4
12 21 001011101 5 match 5
23 32 000000010 1 match 6 7
34 43 000000010 1 match 6 7
45 54 101010100 4
56 65 001010100 3
67 76 011101000 4
70 07 101101001 5

02 20 001001101 4 match 4
13 31 000000000 a match 3
24 42 001010110 4
35 53 000000000 a match 3
